news-global-econ.title: Kevin Warsh Sworn In as Federal Reserve Chairman in East Room Ceremony
news-global-econ.description:
Kevin Warsh was sworn in as the 17th chairman of the Federal Reserve on Friday during a ceremony at the White House.

news-global-econ.title: Caitlin Clark's Jersey Sales Officially Pass LeBron James
news-global-econ.description:
Jersey sales for WBA player Caitlin Clark have officially pushed LeBron James to third place as Clark's sales now rank second.

news-global-econ.title: Consumer Sentiment Falls To Record Low on Gas Prices, Inflation Fears
news-global-econ.description:
Both short-term and long-term inflation expectations are climbing as consumers fear price increases will not be confined to gasoline and energy.

news-global-soc.title: Hantavirus exposure risk may be higher than believed in parts of US, study finds
news-global-soc.description: Washington State University researchers found unexpectedly high hantavirus levels in rodents across farms and forests in the Pacific Northwest region.

news-global-soc.title: AI layoffs may be backfiring on companies
news-global-soc.description: About 80% of companies deploying AI reported workforce reductions, but Gartner says those cuts did not translate into stronger returns on investment.

news-global-soc.title: Army cuts helicopters, pushes ‘Amazon for war’ as drone combat reshapes military
news-global-soc.description: Army leaders signal drone warfare lessons from Ukraine and the Middle East are driving cuts to Apache, Black Hawk and Chinook helicopter programs.
